# The Seaweed Sword
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=The%20Seaweed%20Sword&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = The Seaweed Sword
| slot = sword
| tier = ST
| desc = Crafted from the seaweed that occupies the Riverborn's face, the sword is agile and very deadly.

| rof = 120
|| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 500
| minDmg = 75
| maxDmg = 145
| amplitude = 1
| frequency = 0.3
| shots = 3
| arcgap = 8
| feedp = 500
| fameb = 5

| bonuses = {{Stat|vit|4}}

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is obtainable from the Riverborn realm event.|rarity = a|range2 = 5}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
